subject: [PATCH] mm/bpf_memcontrol: mark BPF memcg kfuncs static

2026-06-22.patch_summary: This patch marks several BPF memory control functions in bpf_memcontrol.c as static, since they are only referenced by BPF programs and resolved through BTF (Binary Interface Format). This change is made to remove unnecessary external linkage. The affected functions include bpf_get_root_mem_cgroup, bpf_get_mem_cgroup, bpf_put_mem_cgroup, bpf_mem_cgroup_vm_events, and bpf_mem_cgroup_usage. These changes are based on the introduction of BPF kfuncs in previous commits (5904db9891f8, 5c7db3239c9f, and 99430ab8b804). The patch is reported to fix a kernel test robot issue and closes a related bug report.
